description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build on multiple OS environments (ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04), build-clang-9-Linux on ubuntu-18.04 with clang-9, and build-clang-10-osx on macos-10.15 with clang. Each job checks out the repository, sets up cmake, compiles, runs tests, and saves test artifacts.
